plugins.name: pin
plugins.description: Pin + Protocol + Fact disciplines for agent-driven research: lock design decisions against silent rollback, make every data element traceable to code, keep citeable observations structured, and keep the human genuinely in the loop.

plugins.name: vibe-slides
plugins.description: Author academic slide decks via a markdown DSL: extract theme/components from a .pptx template, iterate on a content-only outline, then compile to .pptx with pptxgenjs.

plugins.name: sop
plugins.description: Standard operating procedure skills for repeatable engineering workflows, including GitLab merge request submission.
